name: Maher Bhatt
title: CSE Student · Web Development & AI
intro: I build real-world web applications that solve actual problems — not just practice projects.
about: I build practical web applications that solve real problems for students and communities. My work includes a lost & found platform actively used on campus, a centralized study resource used by peers during exams, and hands-on cybersecurity competition experience.
My focus is Web Development and AI — building usable, clean systems rather than academic exercises. Long-term, I'm exploring cybersecurity as a serious discipline.
Self-driven learner. I don't wait for college to teach me — I build, ship, and iterate. Most of what I know comes from real projects, not coursework.
Open to internships, freelance work, and collaborations where I can contribute real value and keep growing.
contactLines: Open for internships, freelance projects, and collaborations.
If you're building something real and need a developer who can execute — let's connect.
